root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as membername , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(0)::text, 1 ) as line_1 , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(0)::text, 2 ) as line_2 , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(0)::text, 3 )||' '||pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,(0)::text, 4 ) as line_3 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_rep_memno where sc_rep_memno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_rep_memno.rep_type = 'PRESENT' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_rep_memno.order_no
